sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khua khempeuh ah pai kawikawi a, mi khempeuh a hehpih hi;
Athu in hong damsak kik a, lamdang kisa mahmah hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Jesuh, leitung a omlai-in, thupha vive a gen hi;
Keimah zong Jesuh ka um a, ka lungdamna piang
Ka uplohna Pa Pasian in, phatakin hong bawlpha in.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Pasian in thupha hong piakna, Jesuh’ mi kiangah gen hi;
Mihing kim khat in a um a, kim
khat in a um kei hi;
A um lote in lungkhamna, Jesuh cih bang piang ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Kei sih tang ding Topa Jesuh, singlamteh tungah si hi;
Ama lawmte in a vui a, ni thum ciang a
Tu’n vantung khua-ah a om a, mi khempeuh a hehpih hi.
